creator: denverh@comcast.net
text:
If you start zim with -f (flush index and force rebuilding) this problem returns for all notebooks.

I have a jail with
FreeBSD fbsd12.lan 12.2-RELEASE FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE releng/14.1-n267679-10e31f0946d8 GENERIC  amd64
where zim work OK.  The version of sqlite there is:
sqlite3-3.38.5,1
On the 14.1 system it's:
sqlite3-3.46.0,1

If the problem is actually with sqlite, then it seems to be between 3.38 and 3.46.

Thanks,

Denver
